caption: A man wearing glasses and a distinctive blue pointed hat with side flaps is captured in a medium close-up shot. He is dressed in a dark blue garment and is gesturing with his right hand extended forward, palm facing inward. The background is softly blurred, showing greenery and parts of other people. A logo for "plustv" is visible in the upper left corner of each scene. A purple banner across the lower portion of the screen reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a white bar contains the text "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA/LIVE-TV". In the final segment, the text "SUBSCRIBE" appears alongside the link "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". Across the sequence, the man's position and gesture remain virtually static, with only minor shifts in his facial expression and hand movement.
